1.7m at Ribeira with that wind? Might be worth a paddle, if you're feeling lucky.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h S (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 17.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h SE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 29.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.5m and offshore winds, Molhe Leste might offer a few rideable moments today; maybe a closeout or two for excitement.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h SE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 29.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.6m and with that onshore breeze, you'll get wet, though whether you'll get barreled is another matter entirely.
🌊 Swell: 1.6m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h WSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 24.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.4 meters with that wind, today's session will either be surprisingly good or surprisingly awful.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 18.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
